jobs.name: daily-review
jobs.prompt: Run the Minx daily review playbook. Fetch today's snapshot and insights, fill the wiki review template, persist to Minx/Reviews/YYYY-MM-DD.md, and post a short digest to #reports. If the day is empty, skip silently. Wrap in start_playbook_run/complete_playbook_run.

jobs.name: goal-nudge
jobs.prompt: Run the Minx goal nudge playbook. Evaluate each active goal's trajectory and post concrete, data-cited nudges to #journal for at most 3 at-risk goals. Respect recent snoozes. Never auto-modify goals. Wrap in start_playbook_run/complete_playbook_run.

jobs.name: memory-review
jobs.prompt: Run the Minx memory candidate review playbook. Surface up to 10 pending memory candidates to #journal with durable memory IDs and exact follow-up commands, persist the surfaced set to Minx/System/memory-review-pending.md, and complete the playbook immediately after surfacing. Do not wait in cron for a user reply. Wrap in start_playbook_run/complete_playbook_run.

jobs.name: playbook-reconcile-sweep
jobs.prompt: Run the Minx playbook reconcile sweep. Call minx_core.playbook_reconcile_crashed(stale_after_minutes=15) exactly once. If reconciled is 0, emit [SILENT]. If reconciled is greater than 0, post a short alert to #reports with the reconciled count and run_ids. Do not run other Minx playbooks.

jobs.name: weekly-review
jobs.prompt: Run the Minx weekly_report playbook. Resolve previous full ISO week (Mon-Sun). Render finance_generate_weekly_report, then synthesize one cross-domain digest across finance, training, meals/nutrition, and goals. Post digest to #reports with link to the finance report vault path. Wrap in start_playbook_run/complete_playbook_run.

jobs.name: wiki-update
jobs.prompt: Run the Minx wiki maintenance playbook. Refresh at most 10 stale wiki pages for active memories using the entity/pattern/goal scaffolds. Skip unchanged pages. Only post to #reports if pages_written > 0. Wrap in start_playbook_run/complete_playbook_run.
